# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5
> Ships with [SkiaSharp 3.119.4](../3.119.4.md) · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/HarfBuzzSharp/8.3.1.5) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)
> **API changes** · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](8.3.1.5/index.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5 ships 6 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Bug Fixes

- **To .NET 10 SDK with workload version set pinning** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **TvOS NativeReference targets to split device/simulator frameworks** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic native assets support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **TvOS: split device/simulator native builds to match iOS pattern** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561))
- **Tizen support: Studio 6.1, TFM fixes, and 3-tab sample** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619))
- **X64 and arm64 native build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620))
